_comment: Map blog slug → ordered list of AdSense slot IDs. Get the IDs from https://adsense.google.com → Ads → By ad unit. Each article currently has 2 slots: top (above fold) and bottom (post-content). Once filled in, run: python ../../apply_adsense_slots.py
_note_others: All other articles fall back to _default_top / _default_bottom.
_note_amp: AMP pages use <amp-auto-ads> only — no per-slot needed.
